steps.title: Match corresponding angles
steps.content: Since triangle $RST$ is similar to triangle $UVW$, angle $T$ corresponds to angle $W$. Therefore, $\tan W=\tan T$.

steps.title: Find the tangent ratio
steps.content: The side lengths are $32$, $60$, and $68$. Since $68$ is the hypotenuse, relative to angle $T$, the opposite leg is $32$ and the adjacent leg is $60$. $$\tan T=\frac{32}{60}=\frac{8}{15}$$ The answer is B.
